zh.lifeSummary: 當Irmgard von Kleve於1307年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福可列福時，她的父親Otto Graf Von Kleve30歲，母親Mechtild von Virneburg21歲。她於1327年與Jan IV van Arkel結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1362年8月6日在荷蘭-拉藍德格利姆享年55歲，埋葬在荷蘭-拉藍德阿可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Irmgard von Kleve于1307年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福可列福时，她的父亲Otto Graf Von Kleve30岁，母亲Mechtild von Virneburg21岁。她于1327年与Jan IV van Arkel结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1362年8月6日在荷兰-拉藍德格利姆享年55岁，埋葬在荷兰-拉藍德阿可爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Kleve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Kleve (earlier Cleve) in Lower Rhineland, Westphalia, or Schleswig-Holstein. The placename probably derives from an old topographic term cleve ‘swamp’. Compare Cleve .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads named Kleiva, from Old Norse kleif, klif ‘cliff, rocky ascent with a road or path’.

variants.name: Klever
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Kurt, Ulrike.
German and Dutch: habitational name for someone from Kleve in the Rhineland or Schleswig-Holstein (see   Kleve   1).

German: from Middle Low German klēver ‘clover, meadow’, also ‘resin, turpentine’, hence a metonymic occupational name either for a farmer who grew clover or for someone who collected resin and distilled turpentine. In the Alemannic area this was also a nickname for a bungler. Compare Cleaver and Clever .

variants.name: Kleven
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Berger, Hjalmer, Jalmer, Knute, Maren, Obert, Thor, Thorval.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads all over Norway named Kleven, from the definite singular form of   Kleve  . Compare   Cleven   and   Cleveland  .
Dutch and German: rare variant of   Cleven  .

nameMeanings.name: Irmgard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Irmgard von Kleve was born in 1307, in Cleves, Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, her father, Otto Graf Von Kleve, was 30 and her mother, Mechtild von Virneburg, was 21. She married Jan IV van Arkel in 1327. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 6 August 1362, in Gorinchem, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 55, and was buried in Arkel, South Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Irmgard von Kleve est née en 1307, à Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Otto Graf Von Kleve, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mechtild von Virneburg, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Jan IV van Arkel en 1327. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 août 1362, à Gorinchem, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Arkel, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Irmgard von Kleve 1307 in Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto Graf Von Kleve 30 und ihre Mutter Mechtild von Virneburg 21. Sie hat 1327 Jan IV van Arkel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. August 1362 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Gorinchem, Südholland, Niederlande und wurde in Arkel, Südholland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Irmgard von Kleve è nata il nel 1307 nel Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, sua padre, Otto Graf Von Kleve, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Mechtild von Virneburg, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Jan IV van Arkel nel 1327. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 agosto 1362, nel Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Arkel, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Irmgard von Kleveが1307年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブクレブで生まれた時，父Otto Graf Von Kleveは30歳，母Mechtild von Virneburgは21歳であった。1327年にJan IV van Arkelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1362年8月6日にオランダズイド-hオランドゴリンケムで55歳で死去し，オランダズイド-hオランドアルケルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Irmgard von Kleve(이)가 1307년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 클브 클브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto Graf Von Kleve(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mechtild von Virneburg(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1327년 Jan IV van Arkel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1362년 8월 6일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 고린체에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 아클에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Irmgard von Kleve nasceu em 1307, em Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Otto Graf Von Kleve, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mechtild von Virneburg, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Jan IV van Arkel em 1327. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1362, em Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Arkel, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Irmgard von Kleve родилась в 1307 г. в местности клив, клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, её отцу по имени Otto Graf Von Kleve было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechtild von Virneburg, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jan IV van Arkel в 1327 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 6 августа 1362 г. в местности горинчем, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности аркел, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Irmgard von Kleve nació en 1307, en Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Otto Graf Von Kleve, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mechtild von Virneburg, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jan IV van Arkel en 1327. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1362, en Gorinchem, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Arkel, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos.
